case_for: Adams has hit or exceeded the 12-point threshold in three of his last four games, including a strong wk13 performance, and carries a healthy 17.6-point consensus projection reflecting consistent target volume as a clear WR1.
case_against: His scoring has been volatile with two sub-10-point floors in the recent stretch (wk8, wk10), showing he can be neutralized by tough coverage or game script.
